generated.recommendation: Further evaluation recommended for underlying cause of lung volumes being low

ground_truth.findings: Unchanged cardiomegaly. There is continued interstitial prominence bilaterally. Unchanged vascular appearance. There is patchy retrocardiac opacity. Negative for pneumothorax.
